title: Medical and Clinical Laboratory Technicians
description: Perform routine medical laboratory tests for the diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of disease. May work under the supervision of a medical technologist.

tasks.text: Conduct chemical analyses of body fluids, such as blood or urine, using microscope or automatic analyzer to detect abnormalities or diseases and enter findings into computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze the results of tests or experiments to ensure conformity to specifications, using special mechanical or electrical devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Set up, maintain, calibrate, clean, and test sterility of medical laboratory equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare standard volumetric solutions or reagents to be combined with samples, following standardized formulas or experimental procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect blood or tissue samples from patients, observing principles of asepsis to obtain blood sample.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise or instruct other technicians or laboratory assistants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct blood tests for transfusion purposes and perform blood counts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain specimens, cultivating, isolating, and identifying microorganisms for analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine cells stained with dye to locate abnormalities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with a pathologist to determine a final diagnosis when abnormal cells are found.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform medical research to further control or cure disease.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test raw materials, processes, or finished products to determine quality or quantity of materials or characteristics of a substance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze and record test data to issue reports that use charts, graphs, or narratives.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.
